reporting_definitions.units_per_hour: For each employee, divide total completed production units by total productive minutes attached to those completed units, then multiply by 60.
reporting_definitions.completion_rate: Completed eligible production-task count divided by eligible production-task count.
reporting_definitions.rework_rate: Rework task count divided by eligible production-task count.
reporting_definitions.delayed_high_priority_task: A HIGH or URGENT task with due_at strictly before the state cutoff that is not completed by the cutoff.
reporting_definitions.employee_ranking: Rank employees by units per hour descending, then employee_id ascending.
reporting_definitions.lowest_performing_team: Rank teams by completion rate ascending, then team_id ascending.
